<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TopK; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/topk.info/ * * Returns number of required items (k), width, depth and decay values. */ class TOPKINFO extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TOPK.INFO'; } public function parseResponse($data) { $result = []; for ($i = 0, $iMax = count($data); $i < $iMax; ++$i) { if (array_key_exists($i + 1, $data)) { $result[(string) $data[$i]] = $data[++$i]; } } return $result; } }
